name: LOZ Golf Lounge
address: 5384 Osage Beach Pkwy, Osage Beach, MO 65065
about: LOZ Golf Lounge is an indoor golf and shooting simulator venue in Osage Beach, MO. The facility offers golf simulation using TrackMan 4 technology with access to over 450 courses worldwide, along with a world-class sporting clays shooting simulator. Pricing is bay-based, with hourly rates for golf and shooting simulators. It is suitable for individual practice, group play, and serious game analysis using professional-grade tracking equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan 4 technology for detailed swing and ball data
Access to over 450+ world-class golf courses
Combine golf with a high-end shooting simulator for a multi-sport experience

food_and_drink.notes: Connected to a sports bar and grill, food service is available on-site.
Not explicitly stated to be available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for ball and club tracking
Olympic-developed simulator for skeet, trap, and sporting clays

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, or rent them for $15 per bag. They have complete sets for lefties, righties, women, and children.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue is connected to a sports bar and grill, so you can purchase food and drinks on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It depends on your skill level and the number of players. A single player can play 18 holes in 1-2 hours, while a skilled foursome will need 3-4 hours.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to play with your children, but they must have adult supervision.
